scripts.start: HOST=${HOST:-127.0.0.1}; PORT=3000; pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:$PORT -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; fi; bun pages/*.html --host=$HOST:$PORT
scripts.start:watch: HOST=${HOST:-127.0.0.1}; PORT=3000; pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:$PORT -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; fi; bun pages/*.html --watch --no-clear-screen --host=$HOST:$PORT
